/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FirstProgram.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FirstProgram.dir/source/FirstProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FirstProgram.dir/source/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FirstProgram.dir/source/QueryAndPrint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FirstProgram.dir/source/Query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FirstProgram.dir/source/Calc.cpp.o -o FirstProgram
